summary: Iteration 102 - Tested Access Policies features: Delete Restrictions, Time-Based Delete Limits, and Operator Visibility. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All Access Control tab UI elements verified, Dashboard and POS visibility for operators correctly restricted.
critical_code_review_comments: Access Policies CRUD - VERIFIED: GET/PUT /api/access-policies works correctly with all 7 modules and 6 visibility toggles
Delete Restrictions - VERIFIED: Operators blocked (403) from deleting Sales, Expenses, Supplier Payments when policy is admin_only
My Visibility API - VERIFIED: GET /api/access-policies/my-visibility returns correct restrictions based on user role (admin=all false, operator=restrictions true)
Settings Access Control Tab - VERIFIED: UI shows Delete Restrictions for 7 modules with dropdowns (Admin only, Admin & Manager only, Anyone, Disabled)
Time-Based Delete Limit - VERIFIED: Toggle and 'Max age (hours)' input (24h = 1.0 days) working in UI
Operator Visibility Toggles - VERIFIED: 6 toggles present for 'Hide financial summaries', 'Hide profit & net figures', etc.
Dashboard Visibility - VERIFIED: Admin sees ALL cards (Total Sales, Total Expenses, Supplier Payments, Net Profit, Pending Credits)
Dashboard Visibility - VERIFIED: Operator dashboard does not show financial totals (redirected to POS on login)
POS Page Labels - VERIFIED: Operator sees 'Today's Sales/Expenses/Net' labels; Admin sees 'Total Sales/Expenses/Net Profit' labels
Supplier Report Branch Filter - VERIFIED: /api/reports/supplier-balance returns branch_breakdown per supplier
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 102 verified all access policies features: 1) Settings > Access Control tab with Delete Restrictions for 7 modules (Sales, Expenses, Supplier Payments, Stock Items, Customers, Invoices, Employees) with dropdown options (Admin only, Admin & Manager only, Anyone, Disabled), 2) Time-Based Delete Limit toggle with configurable hours (default 24h), 3) Operator Visibility toggles (6 options including hide_financials, hide_profit, hide_analytics, hide_reports, hide_supplier_credit, hide_employee_salary), 4) DELETE endpoints correctly block operators when policy is admin_only (returns 403), 5) Dashboard cards correctly filtered based on visibility settings - operators don't see Total Expenses, Supplier Payments, Net Profit, 6) POS page shows 'Today's' prefix labels for operators vs 'Total' labels for admins, 7) Supplier Report branch filter still working from previous iteration.
known_limitations: SMTP email remains blocked by external M365 auth issue (pre-existing from previous iterations)
